Contacting the Board of Education You can contact the Board of Education by emailing [schoolboard@juneauschools.org](mailto:schoolboard@juneauschools.org) Click this block for individual contacts. PLEASE NOTE: Written communications with public officials generally are considered a public record and subject to disclosure (viewing and/or copying of the communication) pursuant to a public records request.
Meeting Guidelines for Public ParticipationThe Board of Education welcomes public participation in meetings. Here are some guidelines to follow during Board of Education meetings.

Juneau School District Board of Education Policy Online Manual is available by clicking on this block. The policy online manual is searchable and allows export and download PDF files of each policy, administrative regulation, or exhibit.
